Lead Magnets
• Your lead magnet is how you turn visitors to subscribers
• And it’s how you drive traffic to your opt-in page
• A great lead magnet means it will be easier/cheaper to drive traffic
• And it will be easier/cheaper to get leads (and build your list)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

How this is going to work…
• I’m going to be asking for volunteers
• I’ll unmute your line
• We’ll talk BRIEFLY about your business
• And then we’ll do a great big group brainstorm
• During the brainstorm, you can type your ideas into the question box
• Then we’ll go onto our next volunteer
• It’s that simple 	🙂
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

How to ask a question…
• To ask a question live, click on the
Hand Icon in the GoToWebinar
Control Panel
• If you need help, send an email to
support@productlaunchformula.com
